Creative Rights.

An AI-powered platform that protects musicians from theft, ensures fair and transparent payment, and builds a direct connection between artists and the people who love their music.

Join the Shield See How It Works

Free early access

The Problem

Independent artists are
unprotected and underpaid.

The music industry generates billions every year. The people who create the music see almost none of it.

"Picture this. You are an independent artist. You have spent years building your catalog and your following. One day, someone creates a playlist, adds your music to it, and pays for bot streams to inflate the numbers. The streaming platform detects the fraud — and takes down your profile. Not the scammer's. Yours. Your entire catalog, gone overnight. Your income, gone. And when you try to fight it, you are talking to an automated support system that claims to have evidence but won't show it to you."

"This is not a hypothetical. It has happened to established independent artists who lost years of work in a single evening — with no meaningful recourse, no human on the other end, and no timeline for resolution. AI-generated music uploaded to your verified profile. Fake collaborations released under your name. Songs you never wrote appearing in your official discography."

The platforms weren't built to stop this.
Fortis is.

"Streaming platforms were built as an ATM machine — you put your money in, you get your music."

"They don't do anything for the artist. Artists want to communicate with their fans." Streaming platforms are still saying: "We'll put you on our list if you're nice to us." Meanwhile, they guard listener data because that data is the only moat they have.

"In nicer words, the truth is: streaming platforms do not want you to have a relationship with your fans. They want your fans to have a relationship with streaming platforms."

"Under the current payment system used by major streaming platforms, all subscription money goes into one giant pool and is distributed based on total market share — not based on what you actually listened to."

"Your money doesn't go to the artists you love. It goes to whoever has the most streams globally. The system is designed to subsidize mega-stars while starving independent musicians."

Music Theft & Impersonation

Fake songs uploaded to verified profiles. AI-generated tracks released under real artist names. It happens every day — with no protection and no recourse.

Unfair & Opaque Royalties

Platforms and labels capture most of the revenue. Artists receive $0.003 per stream on average — and have no visibility into how the number is calculated.

Broken Artist–Fan Relationship

Algorithms decide who sees what. Artists cannot reach their own audience without paying for ads. The authentic connection that built music culture — destroyed by design.

No Infrastructure for Independent Artists

Artists from emerging markets have fewer tools, less visibility, and no platform that fights for them. Talent is global — the system isn't built that way.

The Solution

One platform.
Protection, payment, and connection.

Fortis Music is built on AI and blockchain — not to follow trends, but because these are the only tools capable of solving these problems at scale.

01 — Protect

Blockchain Certification

Every track receives an immutable blockchain certificate the moment it is uploaded. Proof of ownership that cannot be faked, deleted, or disputed — ever.

02 — Detect

AI Fingerprinting

Fortis monitors streaming platforms in real time. The moment your music appears without permission — you know immediately. Automatic detection, instant alert.

03 — Earn

Transparent Direct Revenue

Tips, Drop releases, collab royalty splits — all tracked on blockchain with full transparency. Smart contracts distribute revenue automatically and fairly to every contributor.

04 — Connect

Live Artist–Fan Ecosystem

Drop Rooms, Live Collabs, Jukebox, Club Streams — real spaces where artists and their communities meet. Not an algorithm deciding who sees what. A real relationship.

Built For

Every role in
the music ecosystem.

Fortis creates value for everyone who is currently failed by the existing system.

Artists & DJs

  • Blockchain-certified music from day one
  • Real-time theft detection across all platforms
  • Direct revenue — tips, drops, collab splits
  • Drop format for simultaneous global releases
  • Live sessions and collab tools

Fans

  • Direct connection with the artists they love
  • Be first — Early Listener badges on new releases
  • Vote for what plays in Jukebox rooms
  • Tip artists, unlock exclusive content and merch
  • Watch clubs and live events from anywhere

Institutions & Venues

  • Compliance-ready rights verification
  • Automated licensing documentation
  • Live streaming directly to Fortis audience
  • Artist booking through the platform
  • Transparent royalty distribution for live events
The Team

Built by someone who
lived the problem.

ZJ

Zoran Jovanović

CEO & Founder

Zoran Jovanović is a seasoned music‑industry professional with more than 30 years of experience across Serbia and France. His background spans DJing, music production, event organization, and venue management, giving him a comprehensive understanding of the creative, operational, and business sides of the music ecosystem.

Driven by a lifelong passion for music — not just as something he listens to, but something he lives — Zoran has spent decades working closely with artists and creative communities. Through this experience, he witnessed firsthand the challenges independent musicians face: rights violations, unclear payouts, fraud, exploitation, and the absence of a fair system that protects creators.

Fortis Music was founded as a direct response to these challenges. Recognizing the scale of exploitation in the digital music landscape, Zoran set out to build the platform that should have existed years ago — a global, AI‑powered ecosystem designed to protect creative rights, ensure transparent monetization, and empower artists and fans within a unified digital environment.

SD

Sava Devic

CMO & Creative Lead

Sava Dević is a multidisciplinary creative director and brand strategist with extensive experience across music, design, and digital culture. His background includes years as a DJ, event organizer, and co‑owner of bar and club, where he worked closely with artists, performers, and creative communities. This hands‑on experience gives him a deep understanding of how musicians think, create, and connect with their audiences.

Beyond the music world, Sava has built a strong international portfolio in design and branding, contributing to major conferences, cultural events, and creative projects in the United States and Europe. His work blends visual identity, storytelling, and user‑centric design — shaping how brands communicate and how communities form around them.

At Fortis Music, Sava leads the creative vision of the platform. He is responsible for defining the visual identity, user experience, and narrative that connects Fortis with its global audience — musicians, fans, and industry partners. His role ensures that the platform not only functions seamlessly, but also feels inspiring, intuitive, and culturally relevant.
